items.title: my favorite game right now!
items.summary: im so glad the mobile version of the game is available in my region now! i’ve been playing on steam for the past couple months and im addicted!! the art is amazing, im obsessed with the story, and the card game is so so fun!!! my only problem is that the gpt english translation can be a bit confusing at first but the game is still beautifully amazing 👏👏👏
items.author: MichalBoio
